outcome.text:
33.21 *Calystegia*

Poriën 7–9 µm (of langwerpig); afstanden 20–25 µm. Exine 4–6 µm; columellae 3–4,5 µm, distaal vertakt.

*Calystegia sepium* (L.) R. BR. (3)
74,5–92,0 µm, MiW 84,2 µm; 54 PK, 0a

*Calystegia soldanella* (L.) ROEM. & SCHULT. (2)
87,0–99,5 µm, MiW 92,6 µm; 50 PK, 0a

*Calystegia sylvatica* (KIT.) GRIS. (1)
78,0–104,3 µm, MiW 91,0 µm; 37 PK, Oa
